sys_cb_design_topic.design_definition: {"type":"FlowTopic","triggers":[{"type":"Trigger","name":"9278ff051bea4e768f16a2843ad7f598","triggerType":"request","applicability":{"type":"Applicability","mode":"script","value":"true"},"id":"9278ff051bea4e768f16a2843ad7f598"}],"goals":[{"name":"primary","trigger_id":"9278ff051bea4e768f16a2843ad7f598","nodes":[{"type":"StartGoal","goal_id":"primary","greeting_msg":{"type":"String","mode":"string","value":"gs.getMessageLang(\"va:topic:7a97e2768708fed002fdeac73cbb35f6:node:4e2a7127b02242278ee77b406d45c656:field:GreetingMsg\", vaContext.getRequesterLang())"},"id":"4e2a7127b02242278ee77b406d45c656","name":"Start","expert_mode":false},{"type":"TerminateGoal","goal_id":"primary","confirmation_msg":{"type":"String","mode":"string","value":""},"id":"537035c1b0af4218948531910b8e162e","name":"End","expert_mode":false},{"type":"InputPrompt","variable_id":"87ec94ff32a6400980f124897e60977d","message":{"type":"String","mode":"string","value":"gs.getMessageLang(\"Please enter the customer ID\", vaContext.getRequesterLang())"},"nlu_entity_binding":{"type":"NLUEntityBinding","allow_text_input":false,"use_confirmation_prompt":true},"request_feedback":true,"skippable":{"type":"Applicability","mode":"script","value":"false"},"skipreprompt":{"type":"Applicability","mode":"script","value":"false"},"id":"ae3de7b246e24429ba7edd5884f6985c","name":"Customer Number","goal_id":"primary","applicability":{"type":"Applicability","mode":"script","value":"true"},"expert_mode":false,"formatType":"Text","validationScript":"","description":""},{"type":"ChoiceInputPrompt","expression_mode":"simple","metadataScript":"","cardName":"Small image with text","cardFields":[{"name":"title","value":{"type":"String","mode":"string","value":"gs.getMessageLang(\"Select an Option to Continue\", vaContext.getRequesterLang())"},"required":true},{"name":"description","value":{"type":"String","mode":"string","value":""},"required":false},{"name":"image","value":{"type":"String","mode":"script","value":"(function execute() { var url = gs.getProperty(\"glide.servlet.uri\"); return url + \"OIP (1)_1758479068139.jpg\";})()"},"required":true},{"name":"imageAlt","value":{"type":"String","mode":"string","value":""},"required":false}],"id":"86f1afcc0d52401588f20d962145d3d3","name":"Customer Choice","goal_id":"primary","applicability":{"type":"Applicability","mode":"script","value":"true"},"expert_mode":false,"variable_id":"7c971c38a672431486e56e69bb272363","message":{"type":"String","mode":"string","value":"gs.getMessageLang(\"What would you like to do next?\", vaContext.getRequesterLang())"},"request_feedback":false,"skippable":{"type":"Applicability","mode":"script","value":"false"},"skipreprompt":{"type":"Applicability","mode":"script","value":"false"},"nlu_entity_binding":{"type":"NLUEntityBinding","allow_text_input":false,"use_confirmation_prompt":true},"description":""},{"type":"TextOutputPrompt","value":[{"type":"String","mode":"string","value":"gs.getMessageLang(\"Here are the details for {0}:\", vaContext.getRequesterLang(), [vaInputs.customer_number])"}],"request_feedback":true,"id":"c705a2f175734795b15013b32366a398","name":"Bot Response 1","goal_id":"primary","applicability":{"type":"Applicability","mode":"script","value":"true"},"expert_mode":false,"secure":false},{"type":"Decision","name":"Decision","branches":[{"type":"Branch","label":"Check Profile Details","expression":{"type":"Applicability","mode":"query","value":""},"id":"0488272dee3a4d00a4d6d78e3706284f","name":"Check Profile Details","expert_mode":false},{"type":"Branch","label":"Check Notification","expression":{"type":"Applicability","mode":"query","value":"customer_choice=Check Notfictation"},"id":"896953174b7141b2a4cd68ff157cb56e","name":"Check Notification","expert_mode":false}],"id":"165485e34f2f4b738beea378329ed729","goal_id":"primary","expert_mode":false},{"type":"RecordOutputPrompt","mode":"query","table":"x_cpszo_spoke_customer_profile","fields":["name","email","mobile_number","last_payment_date","risk_score","risk_band","days_since_last_payment","credit_behaviour"],"request_feedback":true,"id":"f0cb0f77f3cf49a9aa93ded5907e21b8","name":"Customer Profile Details","goal_id":"primary","applicability":{"type":"Applicability","mode":"script","value":"true"},"expert_mode":false,"reference_qualifier_condition":"name={{vaInputs.customer_number}}^ORnumberLIKE{{vaInputs.customer_number}}","condition":{"type":"Condition","mode":"glide_query","value":"name={{vaInputs.customer_number}}^ORnumberLIKE{{vaInputs.customer_number}}"}},{"type":"TextOutputPrompt","value":[{"type":"String","mode":"string","value":"gs.getMessageLang(\"va:topic:7a97e2768708fed002fdeac73cbb35f6:node:7bb600b3c4eb41a9b74ae5bdc43817eb:field:0\", Notification Record","goal_id":"primary","applicability":{"type":"Applicability","mode":"script","value":"true"},"expert_mode":false,"reference_qualifier_condition":"number={{vaInputs.customer_number}}^ORnumberLIKE{{vaInputs.customer_number}}","condition":{"type":"Condition","mode":"glide_query","value":"number={{vaInputs.customer_number}}^ORnumberLIKE{{vaInputs.customer_number}}"}}],"edges":[{"type":"Edge","source_node_id":"4e2a7127b02242278ee77b406d45c656","target_node_id":"ae3de7b246e24429ba7edd5884f6985c","id":"8993db9cb07c47d18053ee94645fd4f6"},{"type":"Edge","source_node_id":"ae3de7b246e24429ba7edd5884f6985c","target_node_id":"c705a2f175734795b15013b32366a398","id":"0b2ba4f1f2ed42ebb4bc460884d10e77"},{"type":"Edge","source_node_id":"c705a2f175734795b15013b32366a398","target_node_id":"86f1afcc0d52401588f20d962145d3d3","id":"1d3f022de3874429a4731d5249e04238"},{"type":"Edge","source_node_id":"86f1afcc0d52401588f20d962145d3d3","target_node_id":"165485e34f2f4b738beea378329ed729","id":"9cc79dfdb0c24c578c63ae911f486b44"},{"type":"Edge","source_node_id":"165485e34f2f4b738beea378329ed729","target_node_id":"f0cb0f77f3cf49a9aa93ded5907e21b8","branch_id":"0488272dee3a4d00a4d6d78e3706284f","id":"c6345493b6144eefab604e8955c2480a","name":"0488272dee3a4d00a4d6d78e3706284f"},{"type":"Edge","source_node_id":"f0cb0f77f3cf49a9aa93ded5907e21b8","target_node_id":"7bb600b3c4eb41a9b74ae5bdc43817eb","id":"41dc40521719469c9dfef2cb32fe39ea"},{"type":"Edge","source_node_id":"7bb600b3c4eb41a9b74ae5bdc43817eb","target_node_id":"537035c1b0af4218948531910b8e162e","id":"9a4d6919e39c454d9a5dc370331ddb78"},{"type":"Edge","source_node_id":"165485e34f2f4b738beea378329ed729","target_node_id":"7ce41ca4d44c45ea80e8e1639f357f10","branch_id":"896953174b7141b2a4cd68ff157cb56e","id":"cba5b5235cb24b3b9160232663272dbd","name":"896953174b7141b2a4cd68ff157cb56e"},{"type":"Edge","source_node_id":"7ce41ca4d44c45ea80e8e1639f357f10","target_node_id":"7bb600b3c4eb41a9b74ae5bdc43817eb","id":"4024b24e47414b298d44b6753d071f39"}
